eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Quay, NM; at 11:59 AM ON MAY 15, 2026 Effective until 12:59 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: UPDATE:  EVACUATION REQUESTED IN NARA VISA-- EVACUTION CENTER WILL BE AT THE METHODIST AND BAPTIST CHURCHES.  NOT THE COMMUNITY CENTER.
